    Class
    Description
    class 
    Simulation
    Represents a simulation instance by keeping references to simulated components.

    Represents components that are expected to be mounted on a bus and take a reference to it.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    IoDevice
    Implements a device that exposes ports on the bus from a certain address.
    class 
    ThreadedIoDevice
    Implements a device that should be simulated on a thread alongside the main simulation loop.

  • Uses of SimulationComponent in microsim.simulation.event

    Fields in microsim.simulation.event declared as SimulationComponent
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    SimulationComponent
    SimulationEvent.owner
    Simulation component that raised this event.
    Constructors in microsim.simulation.event with parameters of type SimulationComponent
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DebugEvent(SimulationComponent owner, String message)
    Instantiates debug event getting debug information
     
    SimulationEvent(SimulationComponent owner)
    Instantiates SimulationEvent getting a reference to the simulation component that raised it.
